summary: High‑quality matrix recording of the March 26 1990 show with a solid performance praised by reviewers.
review: Both reviewers commend the sound, calling it “pretty awesome” and “excellent,” and note that the performance is strong. The source appears to be a matrix mix, giving a good balance of instrument clarity and audience ambience. No specific songs are highlighted, but the overall impression is very positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 4‑star reviews praise both the audio quality and the performance, indicating a good show captured with a solid matrix recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as “pretty awesome” and “excellent,” noting that the matrix source provides clear instrument separation while retaining crowd ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing; reviewers only mention listening to the first six songs but overall call the performance “damn good.”
